author: lOrm
content: Fixed. Extracted process_cwd_lock() helper into src/tools/testutil.rs (cfg-test module). worktree.rs and cron.rs now both delegate to that single OnceLock<Mutex<()>>, so CWD-mutating tests across the two modules now actually serialise against each other. The local cwd_lock() wrappers are retained as thin aliases for call-site readability.
